overall.description: A first-person walk through a dystopian urban plaza during a severe orange sandstorm at night. The camera moves steadily forward through heavy smog past swaying palm trees and street lamps toward a massive commercial building with glowing digital billboards. This is high-quality game engine footage, likely from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring cinematic atmospheric effects and neon-lit architecture emerging from the haze.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide urban plaza engulfed in heavy orange smog. The camera moves forward past concrete benches on the left and swaying palm trees on the right, illuminated by street lamps cutting through the haze. The atmosphere is dystopian and desolate, with visibility limited to approximately 50 meters.

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, a massive commercial building materializes from the smog, its digital billboards glowing with colorful advertisements. The plaza benches fall behind while the palm trees recede into the background on the right. The environment remains heavily obscured by the orange storm, with the building's lights providing the primary focal point.

scene_state.functional_zone: building underpass entrance with road crossing

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the building and turns toward an underpass entrance, revealing an asphalt road with yellow lane markings. The commercial building with its bright billboards now dominates the left side of the frame. A lone pedestrian stands near a street lamp at the underpass entrance, and the environment transitions from open plaza to a more enclosed, sheltered space under the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate, smog-choked plaza that gradually converges upon a towering commercial structure and a sheltered underpass. It begins by gliding past concrete benches and swaying palm trees, with street lamps struggling to pierce through a heavy, orange dystopian haze. As the camera advances, the open plaza recedes and a massive building materializes from the smog, its glowing digital billboards becoming the primary focal point against the obscured environment. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches the structure and turns toward an asphalt road with yellow lane markings, moving away from the open air. Finally, the perspective transitions into the enclosed space of an underpass entrance where a lone pedestrian stands beneath a street lamp.
